items.claim: McGregor's speed will be negatively impacted by cutting to 155 pounds.
items.quote: McGregor cutting to 155 would get slower

items.claim: Holloway's speed and volume will be compromised by fighting at 170 pounds.
items.quote: I do think his speed and volume, which is an attribute of his, is going to be a bit compromised at 170.

items.claim: Holloway will be sturdier and able to take more damage at 170 pounds.
items.quote: I guess maybe the only advantage is that I think maybe he's going to be a little bit sturdier and be able to take a little bit more damage.

items.claim: McGregor uses the clinch to rest and recover when he gets tired.
items.quote: if he gets tired he's going to start wrestling. We saw it against Nate Diaz... those breaks are important for him because if he's not getting the knockdowns... he's gonna have to clinch and get those, you know, that those breaks

items.claim: McGregor prefers to initiate a clinch or take a sloppy shot to get submitted rather than risk being knocked out.
items.quote: people would rather get submitted than than knocked out. Um, dude, McGregor, if he gets exhausted at some point, and if it starts turning ugly for him, he doesn't want to get knocked out. He is going to wrestle.

items.claim: Holloway's takedown defense has recently been audited.
items.quote: we are just coming off of Max Holloway's takedown defense getting kind of audited

items.claim: McGregor's timing is a hallmark of his fighting style.
items.quote: an element of Connor's game that has always been excellent has been his timing... it's been a hallmark of his game.

items.claim: Holloway is less durable now than he was in previous years.
items.quote: I do think that Max Holloway, even though he's up there in durability, he's probably not as durable as he used to be in in years prior.

items.claim: McGregor has a 5-inch reach advantage over Holloway.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has a 5 in reach advantage.

items.claim: Holloway has an average fight time of 16 minutes and 39 seconds.
items.quote: Max Holloway, Danny, average fight time 16 minutes and 39 seconds.

items.claim: McGregor has an average fight time of 8 minutes.
